MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT ALBA ABARCA, STANLEY NAVARRO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON SEPTEMBER 15, 2010. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Estela Vasquez, is present.
Attorney, James Millar, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Alba Abarcia and Stanley Navarro, is present.
Attorney, Antonio Di Stefano , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-12-2010 is vacated.
